title: Semantic Structure
description: Improve your recipe page with proper semantic HTML5 structure. Add a header element (containing the h1), a main element (for the page content), and a footer element. Also add a meta charset='utf-8' tag inside the head for proper character encoding.
starter_code:
# Recipe Collection Website — Step 2: Semantic Structure
# Add semantic elements: header, main, footer.
# Add meta charset in the head.

html = """
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>My Recipes</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Wrap the h1 in a <header> element -->

    <!-- Wrap main content in a <main> element -->

    <!-- Add a <footer> element -->

</body>
</html>
"""

print(html)
test_code: assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include declaration' assert '' in html.lower() or ' tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include tag' assert '' in html.lower() and 'my recipes' in html.lower(), 'Title should contain "My Recipes"' assert 'charset' in html.lower() and 'utf-8' in html.lower(), 'Must include meta charset="utf-8"' assert '<header>' in html.lower() and '</header>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <header> element' assert '<main>' in html.lower() and '</main>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <main> element' assert '<footer>' in html.lower() and '</footer>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <footer> element' assert '<h1>' in html.lower() and '</h1>' in html.lower(), 'Must include an <h1> heading' assert '<p>' in html.lower() and '</p>' in html.lower(), 'Must include at least one <p> paragraph'
acceptance_criteria: Meta charset='utf-8' is in the head section
Page content is wrapped in a <header> element
Main content area uses a <main> element
A <footer> element is present at the bottom
h1 heading and welcome paragraph are still present
hints: Add <meta charset="utf-8"> inside the <head> before the title
